scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && npm run build:plugins
scripts.build:plugins: ROLLTOP_PLUGIN_TARGET=attachment_preview vite build --config vite.plugins.config.ts && ROLLTOP_PLUGIN_TARGET=bimi_brand_icons vite build --config vite.plugins.config.ts && ROLLTOP_PLUGIN_TARGET=gravatar_sender_icons vite build --config vite.plugins.config.ts && ROLLTOP_PLUGIN_TARGET=language_search vite build --config vite.plugins.config.ts && ROLLTOP_PLUGIN_TARGET=matrix_theme vite build --config vite.plugins.config.ts && npm run build:themes && ROLLTOP_PLUGIN_TARGET=mail_filters vite build --config vite.plugins.config.ts && npm run build:mail-filters-css && ROLLTOP_PLUGIN_TARGET=mail_mcp vite build --config vite.plugins.config.ts && ROLLTOP_PLUGIN_TARGET=remote_imap_sync vite build --config vite.plugins.config.ts && npm run build:remote-imap-sync-css && ROLLTOP_PLUGIN_TARGET=experimental_spam_filter vite build --config vite.plugins.config.ts && npm run build:experimental-spam-filter-css && ROLLTOP_PLUGIN_TARGET=one_click_unsubscribe vite build --config vite.plugins.config.ts && ROLLTOP_PLUGIN_TARGET=remote_image_blocklist vite build --config vite.plugins.config.ts && ROLLTOP_PLUGIN_TARGET=trusted_image_sources vite build --config vite.plugins.config.ts && ROLLTOP_PLUGIN_TARGET=client_side_pgp vite build --config vite.plugins.config.ts && npm run build:pgp-css
